title: Lean Formalization of Key YM Lemmas

analysis.object: T837: Lean Formalization of Key YM Lemmas depth analysis

lean_t812.description: T812 (tropical mass gap): tropical minimum T408 in Lean + tropical YM action -- ~500 lines

lean_t815.description: T815 (lattice descent): Berkovich analytification of lattice + spectral semicontinuity -- ~2000 lines

lean_t817.description: T817 (three-constraint): logical argument -- ~100 lines. Very clean.

lean_t819.description: T819 (spectral gap from compact resolvent): standard functional analysis + Uhlenbeck -- ~3000 lines

lean_t825.description: T825 (Balaban+T775): longest component -- ~5000 lines (Balaban blocks in Lean)

lean_t833.description: T833 (full QFT): OS reconstruction in Lean -- ~2000 lines. Partial Lean4 infrastructure.

t837_estimate.description: T837: Full YM Lean proof ~13000 lines. Longer than Hodge (~12000). Feasible in 3-4 years with dedicated effort. T837.

analysis.theorem: T837: Lean Formalization of Key YM Lemmas (S1116).

key_theorem: T837: Lean Formalization of Key YM Lemmas (S1116).
